name: real file drag-and-drop onto the editor -> both files open as tabs in ONE window
comment: End-to-end coverage of medit's Finder-drop path using AutoPilot's real cross-process file drop (drag + toFiles). Drags two files onto the editorTextView; the destination's real AppKit drop handlers fire (public.file-url + NSFilenamesPboardType) -> onOpenFiles -> openFiles(at:). This is the exact path a user triggers dragging from Finder, and the regression guard for the .fileURL-only multi-file bug (multi-file drops fired no events unless NSFilenamesPboardType was also registered). Requires the Debug build (sandbox OFF), a real display + Accessibility, and staged fixtures (run stage-fixtures.sh). The bravo drop lands last, so the editor shows bravo's contents; window count stays 1 (tabs, not separate windows).
